summary: Data-only backfill: judgment fields (should_fire empty, must_not_fire DEPEG, max_emitted HIGH=0, by_design_discount, asset_class) UNCHANGED from prior label.json; measured GHO/USD $0.9647 sits inside the documented ~$0.96-0.98 soft-peg band and ~25% above LT 0.77, so the fully-backed control stays benign; fidelity marks the swapped probe measured=true (univ3 0x5c95…5bc1d @18600000) and honestly leaves the 0.985 band-coverage point measured=false.
